scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; ua="${npm_config_user_agent:-}"; case "$ua" in pnpm/*|"") ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm run start
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
